title: ambrosia pumila
intro: Ambrosia pumila, also known as Dwarf Bur Marigold or Dwarf Ragweed, is a small annual plant native to North America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant's medicinal properties lie in its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antihistamine effects, making it useful for treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Ambrosia pumila include its ability to reduce itching and swelling, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an immune system booster. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
